class.name: HEGoCurveInputNode
class.brief_description: Creates Houdini curve input geometry from a [Path3D].
class.description:
This node creates a Houdini input curve node and uploads sampled points from a Godot [Path3D].
Instantiate the node first, then call [method set_curve_from_path_3d] to update its curve geometry.
Repeated calls replace the currently uploaded curve data.

method.name: set_curve_from_path_3d
method.description:
Converts the given [Path3D] into Houdini curve input data.
[code]target_length[/code] controls segment sampling or resampling length for generated curve points.
Smaller values generally produce denser sampling, while larger values produce fewer points.
